turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi, I wanted to ask — do you have an in-house pharmacy? Or do I need to go somewhere else for medicines?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes, we have a fully stocked pharmacy right inside the clinic on the ground floor, next to the main reception. It operates from 8 AM to 9 PM daily, including Sundays.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Do you also stock generic medicines? I'm on a tight budget.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Absolutely, we stock both branded and generic equivalents for most common medications. Your doctor can also write generics on the prescription if you request it.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: That's great to know. One more thing — do you have a diabetes clinic or special OPD for diabetic patients?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes! We run a dedicated Diabetes Management OPD every Tuesday and Friday from 10 AM to 1 PM, led by Dr. Arun Srinivas, our endocrinologist. It includes consultations, dietary counselling, and HbA1c monitoring.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Oh that's very useful. Thank you.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: My pleasure! Let us know if there's anything else.
